Class MainWindowAction

java.lang.Object
javax.swing.AbstractAction
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.actions.KeyAction
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.actions.MainWindowAction
All Implemented Interfaces:
ActionListener, Serializable, Cloneable, EventListener, Action
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbandonTaskAction, AboutAction, AutoModeAction, AutoSave, CachingToggleAction, CopyToClipboardAction, CounterExampleAction, CreateGithubIssueAction, DecreaseFontSizeAction, EditMostRecentFileAction, EnsureSourceConsistencyToggleAction, ExitMainAction, ExplorationAction, GoalBackAction, GoalSelectAboveAction, GoalSelectBelowAction, HeatmapSettingsAction, HeatmapToggleAction, HidePackagePrefixToggleAction, IncreaseFontSizeAction, IsabelleTranslateAllAction, IsabelleTranslationAction, KeYProjectHomepageAction, LemmaGenerationAction, LemmaGenerationBatchModeAction, LicenseAction, MenuSendFeedackAction, OpenExampleAction, OpenFileAction, OpenMostRecentFileAction, OpenSingleJavaFileAction, PrettyPrintToggleAction, ProofDiffFrame.Action, ProofManagementAction, PruneProofAction, QuickLoadAction, QuickSaveAction, RightMouseClickToggleAction, RunAllProofsAction, SaveBundleAction, SaveFileAction, SearchInProofTreeAction, SearchInSequentAction, SearchModeChangeAction, SearchNextAction, SearchPreviousAction, SelectionBackAction, SelectionForwardAction, SequentViewDock.OpenCurrentNodeAction, SettingsManager.ShowSettingsAction, ShowActiveSettingsAction, ShowActiveTactletOptionsAction, ShowCreatedByAction, ShowGraphAction, ShowKnownTypesAction, ShowNodeInfoAction, ShowOriginAction, ShowProofStatistics, ShowUsedContractsAction, SMTInvokeAction, SMTOptionsAction, SyntaxHighlightingToggleAction, SystemInfoAction, TacletOptionsAction, TestGenerationAction, ToggleConfirmExitAction, ToggleOriginHighlightAction, ToggleProofTreeTooltipAction, ToggleSequentViewTooltipAction, ToggleSourceViewTooltipAction, ToggleTermOriginTrackingAction, ToolTipOptionsAction, UndoHistoryButton.UndoAction, UnicodeToggleAction
public abstract class MainWindowAction extends KeyAction
KeyAction extended to automatically override the accelerator key after the default is set using setAcceleratorKey(KeyStroke) / setAcceleratorLetter(int) using the KeyStrokeManager.
